ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Whether the player is right-handed or left-handed */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Current ATP or WTA ranking */,
  "career_high_ranking" INTEGER /* The highest ranking the player has achieved */,
  "titles" INTEGER /* Number of titles won */,
  "surface_preference" TEXT /* Preferred surface (e.g., Hard, Clay, Grass) */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the player's coach */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the player is currently injured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Surface type of the tournament (e.g., Hard, Clay, Grass) */,
  "draw_size" INTEGER /* Draw size of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., Grand Slam, ATP 500, ATP 250) */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the main sponsor of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament where the match was played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the match (e.g., R32, R16, QF) */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player in the match */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player in the match */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner of the match */,
  "set_scores" TEXT /* JSON array of set scores */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "court" TEXT /* Court number or name */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., Singles, Doubles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "aces" INTEGER /* Number of aces hit by the player */,
  "double_faults" INTEGER /* Number of double faults hit by the player */,
  "first_serves_in" INTEGER /* Number of first serves in by the player */,
  "first_serves_total" INTEGER /* Total number of first serves by the player */,
  "first_serve_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of first serve points won by the player */,
  "first_serve_points_total" INTEGER /* Total number of first serve points played */,
  "second_serve_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of second serve points won by the player */,
  "second_serve_points_total" INTEGER /* Total number of second serve points played */,
  "break_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of break points won by the player */,
  "break_points_total" INTEGER /* Total number of break points played */,
  "service_games_won" INTEGER /* Number of service games won */,
  "return_games_won" INTEGER /* Number of return games won */,
  "total_points_won" INTEGER /* Total points won */,
  "net_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of net points won */,
  "net_points_total" INTEGER /* Total number of net points played */,
  "forehand_winners" INTEGER /* Number of forehand winners */,
  "backhand_winners" INTEGER /* Number of backhand winners */,
  "unforced_errors" INTEGER /* Number of unforced errors */,
  "forced_errors" INTEGER /* Number of forced errors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "serve_statistics" (
  "serve_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each serve statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "first_serve_return_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of first serve return points won by the player */,
  "first_serve_return_points_total" INTEGER /* Total number of first serve return points played */,
  "second_serve_return_points_won" INTEGER /* Number of second serve return points won by the player */,
  "second_serve_return_points_total" INTEGER /* Total number of second serve return points played */,
  "serve_winners" INTEGER /* Number of serve winners */,
  "serve_errors" INTEGER /* Number of serve errors */,
  "serve_speed_avg" REAL /* Average serve speed */,
  "serve_speed_max" REAL /* Maximum serve speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("serve_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_serve_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_serve_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "break_point_statistics" (
  "break_point_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each break point statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "break_points_converted_won" INTEGER /* Number of break points converted by the player */,
  "break_points_converted_total" INTEGER /* Total number of break points converted by the player */,
  "break_points_faced" INTEGER /* Number of break points faced by the player */,
  "break_points_saved" INTEGER /* Number of break points saved by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("break_point_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_break_point_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_break_point_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
